FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.Q1: What is the UAE Corporate Tax rate?
FAQ.A1: The standard corporate tax rate is 9% on taxable income exceeding AED 375,000. Under this threshold, the rate is 0%.
FAQ.Q2: How often is my bookkeeping updated?
FAQ.A2: We reconcile transactions daily using our AI engine, giving you a real-time view of cash, profit, and tax liability.
FAQ.Q3: Do I get a dedicated accountant?
FAQ.A3: Yes. Every client is assigned a dedicated, Chartered Accountant (Big 4–trained) who reviews and signs off on all reports.
FAQ.Q4: Can you help with FTA audits?
FAQ.A4: Absolutely. We provide full representation and audit defense support in case of FTA inquiries or audits.

HOME.STAKES_TITLE:
What Happens If You
Don't Fix Your Finances
HOME.STAKES_SUBTITLE: This isn't fear-mongering - these are real consequences UAE business owners face every year when their finances aren't handled properly.
HOME.STAKES_C1_DESC: Late VAT filings carry penalties from AED 1,000 upward per period. Corporate Tax errors trigger much larger fines. One missed deadline with the FTA can cost more than a year of professional accounting fees.
HOME.STAKES_C2_DESC: Banks and investors require clean, audited financials before they approve loans or back your business. Messy books mean missed opportunities - or worse, deals falling through at the last minute.
HOME.STAKES_C3_DESC: Without real-time financial visibility, you can't see cashflow problems coming. Businesses that look profitable on paper run out of cash - not because they failed, but because nobody was watching the numbers.
HOME.HOW_SUBTITLE: No complicated onboarding. No jargon. A clear path from financial stress to total confidence — in three steps. This entire setup usually takes 2–4 weeks, depending on complexity.
HOME.HOW_STEP1_DESC: We understand your structure, entities, and current tax and accounting challenges — in one no-pressure call. Free zone, mainland, or multi-entity: we've seen it all.
HOME.HOW_STEP2_DESC: We implement AI-powered bookkeeping and tax workflows tailored to your free zone or mainland setup. Your books become clean, compliant, and automated.
HOME.HOW_STEP3_DESC: You get clean, compliant books and proactive tax and cashflow insights every month. You see your cash runway, tax exposure, and profit — at a glance.
HOME.HOW_TIMELINE_BADGE: ⏱ Most clients are fully set up within 2–4 weeks

HOME.LEAN_DEMO_Q1: Does our holding company qualify for 0% Corporate Tax under Qualifying Free Zone rules?
HOME.LEAN_DEMO_A1: ✅ Yes — subject to conditions. Under UAE CT Law Article 18, QFZP status requires: (1) adequate substance in the Freezone, (2) qualifying income only, (3) non-qualifying revenue ≤5% or AED 5M. Want me to run a full QFZP eligibility check?
HOME.LEAN_DEMO_A2: 📄 Processed. Al Fardan Trading · AED 18,450 · VAT AED 922.50 · TRN ✅ Verified · Category: Office Supplies. Reconciled & archived. ⚠️ Invoice date outside VAT period — flagged.

HOME.FAQ_SUBTITLE: No jargon. Just simple, direct answers to what UAE founders ask us most — from FTA concerns to free zone rules.
HOME.FAQ_TALK_EXPERT: Talk to a Real Expert — Free
HOME.FAQ_TALK_EXPERT_DESC: Book a free 30-minute call with one of our Chartered Accountants. No sales pitch — just honest advice for your business.
HOME.FAQ_Q1: Are you licensed to handle UAE Corporate Tax?
HOME.FAQ_A1: Yes. Booklean's team includes Chartered Accountants (ICAI, ACCA, CPA qualified) with direct experience in UAE Corporate Tax (9%), VAT, and FTA compliance. We handle Corporate Tax registration, structuring, filing, and audit representation. Our AI platform is trained specifically on UAE VAT and CT law and is supervised by qualified tax experts — not generic tools.
HOME.FAQ_Q2: How is this different from just using accounting software?
HOME.FAQ_A2: Software processes transactions — it doesn't think, advise, or take responsibility. Booklean gives you the technology (AI bookkeeping, dashboards, automated reconciliation) plus a team of Chartered Accountants who review every report, handle your FTA filings, and call you when something looks off. Think of us as your full finance department — not a tool you manage.
HOME.FAQ_Q3: Can you work alongside my existing free zone auditor?
HOME.FAQ_A3: Absolutely. Many of our clients have a free zone registered auditor for statutory requirements, and we handle their day-to-day bookkeeping, VAT, Corporate Tax, and CFO advisory. We deliver clean, audit-ready books that make your annual audit faster and cheaper. We can also take over the full statutory audit if you'd like to consolidate.
HOME.FAQ_Q4: How long before my books are fully cleaned up?
HOME.FAQ_A4: For most businesses, the initial cleanup and system setup takes 2–4 weeks depending on how much history needs to be corrected. After that, your books stay clean automatically — no backlogs, no catching up. We'll give you a specific timeline after your free discovery call once we've assessed your current situation.
HOME.FAQ_Q5: Do you handle 0% Corporate Tax for Qualifying Free Zone companies?
HOME.FAQ_A5: Yes. Free Zone companies may qualify for 0% Corporate Tax as a Qualifying Free Zone Person (QFZP) under UAE CT Law Article 18. We assess your eligibility, ensure substance requirements are met, and handle registration and filing. If you don't qualify for 0%, we optimise your position under the 9% rate. We also handle mixed-activity entities where some income qualifies and some doesn't.
HOME.FAQ_Q6: Is my financial data safe with Booklean?
HOME.FAQ_A6: Completely. All data is stored in UAE-based servers (Azure/AWS UAE), encrypted with AES-256, and fully compliant with UAE PDPL regulations. We operate a zero-knowledge architecture — your data is yours. We never share, sell, or retain it beyond our service agreement.

FAQ_SUBTITLE: No jargon. Just simple, direct answers to what UAE founders ask us most — from FTA concerns to free zone rules.
FAQ_TALK_EXPERT: Talk to a Real Expert — Free
FAQ_TALK_EXPERT_DESC: Book a free 30-minute call with one of our Chartered Accountants. No sales pitch — just honest advice for your business.
FAQ_Q1: Are you licensed to handle UAE Corporate Tax?
FAQ_A1: Yes. Booklean's team includes Chartered Accountants (ICAI, ACCA, CPA qualified) with direct experience in UAE Corporate Tax (9%), VAT, and FTA compliance. We handle Corporate Tax registration, structuring, filing, and audit representation. Our AI platform is trained specifically on UAE VAT and CT law and is supervised by qualified tax experts — not generic tools.
FAQ_Q2: How is this different from just using accounting software?
FAQ_A2: Software processes transactions — it doesn't think, advise, or take responsibility. Booklean gives you the technology (AI bookkeeping, dashboards, automated reconciliation) plus a team of Chartered Accountants who review every report, handle your FTA filings, and call you when something looks off. Think of us as your full finance department — not a tool you manage.
FAQ_Q3: Can you work alongside my existing free zone auditor?
FAQ_A3: Absolutely. Many of our clients have a free zone registered auditor for statutory requirements, and we handle their day-to-day bookkeeping, VAT, Corporate Tax, and CFO advisory. We deliver clean, audit-ready books that make your annual audit faster and cheaper. We can also take over the full statutory audit if you'd like to consolidate.
FAQ_Q4: How long before my books are fully cleaned up?
FAQ_A4: For most businesses, the initial cleanup and system setup takes 2–4 weeks depending on how much history needs to be corrected. After that, your books stay clean automatically — no backlogs, no catching up. We'll give you a specific timeline after your free discovery call once we've assessed your current situation.
FAQ_Q5: Do you handle 0% Corporate Tax for Qualifying Free Zone companies?
FAQ_A5: Yes. Free Zone companies may qualify for 0% Corporate Tax as a Qualifying Free Zone Person (QFZP) under UAE CT Law Article 18. We assess your eligibility, ensure substance requirements are met, and handle registration and filing. If you don't qualify for 0%, we optimise your position under the 9% rate. We also handle mixed-activity entities where some income qualifies and some doesn't.
FAQ_Q6: Is my financial data safe with Booklean?
FAQ_A6: Completely. All data is stored in UAE-based servers (Azure/AWS UAE), encrypted with AES-256, and fully compliant with UAE PDPL regulations. We operate a zero-knowledge architecture — your data is yours. We never share, sell, or retain it beyond our service agreement.
